message:
fix(channel/watch): move subscribe receiver_count and version read inside value read-lock

Same TOCTOU class as broadcast fix e9314df5: subscribe() incremented
receiver_count and read current_version() both lock-free, allowing a
concurrent send() to slip a version bump between the two operations.
The new subscriber would set seen_version to the post-send version and
permanently miss that value (watch has no replay buffer).

Fix: hold value.read() while both incrementing receiver_count and
reading the version from the tuple. Since send() holds value.write()
during its version update, the read lock prevents the race.

Adds 2 regression tests validating the structural invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
